name: TestSpec
description: A test specification written as part of TDD, defining the expected behavior of a unit before implementation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the test specification.

name.description: Descriptive name of the test specification.

describe.description: The subject under test described in the outermost describe block.

context.description: The specific scenario or context being tested.

it_should.description: The expected behavior expressed as it should... statement.

then.description: Then expected outcome for BDD-style specs.

assertions.description: List of assertions that must pass for the spec to be satisfied.

tags.description: Tags for filtering and organizing specs.

language.description: Programming language of the test spec.

framework.description: Testing framework the spec is written for.

status.description: Current execution status of the spec.

expected.description: The expected value for the assertion.

message.description: Failure message shown when the assertion fails.
